deviations.what: All twelve Button presses are wired to a single client-side MessageToast.show('Pressed') via the control_global frontend action. The original onPress toasted source.getId() + ' Pressed' (the runtime-generated control id); the id is not reproducible statically, so a fixed 'Pressed' toast stands in. The ariaLabelledBy / ariaDescribedBy associations and the six core:InvisibleText targets are reproduced 1:1.
